title: Cliff Face
description: A performance-friendly way of generating stone cliff faces for steep surfaces. Supports Terralith, Biomes 'O Plenty & more!
body:
![An animated image using a big hill to showcase the difference between Vanilla & Cliff Face. Vanilla's is mostly brown, made out of dirt, whereas Cliff Face's is stone and more barren](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TIAnANoy/images/09b338a1676485e0d84b7cc1dd617c6329d280a3.webp)

Cliff Face

![A wide image of a long cliff face](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abdeb55549f0250c9eb31b96fc7657967f9fae8e_0.webp) # 🪨 Features - **Works best with [MC-258859](https://modrinth.com/mod/mc-258859)**, because of an existing (I view as) bug in Minecraft's code - **Server-side** at no cost of incompatiblity to the client - **Performance friendly** by utilizing Minecraft's surface generation, rather than it's more expensive feature generation - **Supports mods** that change the world using Minecraft's generation system (Terralith, Tectonic, Noisium, Biomes 'O Plenty, Geophilic, Lithopshere & a lot more)
